task: put the crackers in the cupboard
raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS -** A red box of crackers, a yellow bottle, a blue can, and a small green bottle are on a wooden table. A brown cupboard is on the right. The red box is the target. The cupboard has a door that can be opened. STRATEGY - First, reach for the red box, grasp it, then transport it to the cupboard. Next, open the cupboard door, insert the box inside, and finally close the door. Failure modes include dropping the box during transport or failing to open the cupboard door. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the red box body; Step 2 grasp the red box body for secure hold; Step 3 transport the red box to the cupboard; Step 4 open the cupboard door; Step 5 insert the red box into the cupboard; Step 6 close the cupboard door.

Goal: inside(red_box, cupboard); closed(cupboard_door)
Scene: red_box, yellow_bottle, blue_can, green_bottle, cupboard
Step 1: reach(red_box)
  affordance_region: the body of the red box
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, red_box, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, red_box) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(red_box)
  affordance_region: the body of the red box
  contact: holding(red_box) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(red_box)
Step 3: transport(red_box -> cupboard)
  affordance_region: an empty area inside the cupboard
  spatial: above(red_box, cupboard, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(red_box)
  done_when: above(red_box, cupboard, 0.05)
Step 4: open(cupboard_door)
  affordance_region: the handle of the cupboard door
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, cupboard_door_handle, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, cupboard_door_handle) < 0.03
Step 5: insert(red_box -> cupboard)
  affordance_region: an empty area inside the cupboard
  contact: surface_contact(red_box, cupboard) [completion]; released(red_box) [completion]
  pose: stable(red_box) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(red_box, cupboard) AND released(red_box)
Step 6: close(cupboard_door)
  affordance_region: the handle of the cupboard door
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, cupboard_door_handle, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, cupboard_door_handle) < 0.03
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the red box
the body of the red box
an empty area inside the cupboard
the handle of the cupboard door
an empty area inside the cupboard
the handle of the cupboard door
